name: Fresco Marinated Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lipton Recipe Secrets Savory Herb with Garlic Soup Mix
1 lb Boneless, Skinless Chicken Breast Halves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-aluminum baking dish, blend the first four ingredients until well combined.
2. Add the chicken and turn to coat evenly with the marinade. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or overnight.
3. Preheat broiler pan or grill with foil lined and sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
4. Arrange chicken on the preheated pan.
5. Pour half of the marinade over the chicken.
6. Grill or broil, turning once and pouring remaining marinade over chicken until cooked through.
7. Taste test for desired flavor.
